title: Create a new organism from a raw idea seed
description: This verifies that a visitor can submit an idea seed and arrive at a newly created organism detail page with DNA Core visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill in the idea seed field with a raw organism concept
Submit the creation form
Verify the new organism detail page is displayed
Verify the DNA Core tab content is displayed

title: Birth an organism from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can start from the landing page, create a new organism from a raw idea seed, and reach the new organism detail page with DNA Core available.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to create an organism
Fill in the idea seed field with a raw concept for a new organism
Submit the creation form
Verify the organism detail page is displayed
Verify the DNA Core tab is available

title: Create a new organism from the landing page
description: This verifies that a visitor can turn a raw idea into a newly created organism and reach its detail page with DNA available to inspect.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary action to begin creating an organism
Fill in a raw idea seed into the seed field
Submit the organism creation form
Verify the new organism detail page is displayed
Verify DNA strands are displayed for the created organism

title: Inspect the DNA Core on a created organism
description: This verifies that a user can open a newly created organism and inspect the baseline DNA Core content on its detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary call to create an organism
Fill in the idea seed field with a raw concept for a new organism
Submit the creation form
Verify the organism detail page is displayed
Verify DNA Core data is displayed

title: Force evolution and see new DNA mutations appear
description: This verifies that a user can trigger evolution from an organism detail page and observe new DNA strands added afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Click the Force Evolution action
Verify an evolving state is displayed
Verify new DNA strands are displayed after evolution

title: Open the export data modal and close it
description: This verifies that a user can open the organism export experience from a detail page and dismiss the modal overlay.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Click the export data action
Verify the export modal overlay is displayed
Close the export modal
Verify the export modal is no longer displayed

title: See creation progress while an organism is being born
description: This verifies that submitting a valid idea seed shows a generating state before the organism is created.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill in the idea seed field with a raw organism concept
Submit the creation form
Verify a creation progress state is displayed
Verify the page is still focused on the birth flow until creation completes

title: Trigger a dream and see dream DNA fragments appear
description: This verifies that a user can trigger a dream sequence from an organism detail page and observe new dream DNA fragments afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Click the Trigger Dream action
Verify a dreaming state is displayed
Verify new dream DNA strands are displayed after the dream

title: Chat with the swarm agents from an organism detail page
description: This verifies that a user can switch to the swarm agents tab, send a message, and see an agent response in the chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Click the swarm agents tab
Type a message into the agent chat input
Submit the chat message
Verify an agent response is displayed
Verify the chat conversation remains visible

title: Open DNA Core for an existing organism and inspect its strands
description: This verifies that a user can open an organism from bio-storage and view its DNA core content on the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Open the DNA Core tab
Verify DNA strands are displayed
Verify organism metadata is displayed

title: Trigger evolution and see new DNA strands appear
description: This verifies that the Force Evolution action updates the organism with additional DNA strands.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Click an organism card
Trigger Force Evolution from the organism detail page
Verify a new evolution result is displayed
Verify additional DNA strands are visible

title: Trigger dream and see new organism state appear
description: This verifies that the Trigger Dream action produces a visible organism update on the detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Click an organism card
Trigger Dream from the organism detail page
Verify a dream result is displayed
Verify the organism state has updated

title: Open Swarm Agents chat and send a message
description: This verifies that a user can switch to the Swarm Agents tab, send a chat message, and see an agent response appear in the conversation.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Open the Swarm Agents tab
Send a chat message to the agents
Verify the sent message is visible in the conversation
Verify an agent response is visible in the conversation

title: Continue from swarm agents to family tree inspection
description: This verifies that a user can use the organism chat area and then inspect the organism’s lineage in the family tree tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Click the family tree tab
Verify the family tree visualization is displayed
Verify organism lineage nodes are visible

title: Open an organism from bio-storage
description: This verifies that a user can browse the organism list and open an organism detail page from a card.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Click an organism card
Verify the organism detail page is displayed
Verify the organism identity section is displayed

title: Browse public organisms from bio-storage to a detail page
description: This verifies that a user can navigate from the organism list into an organism detail page and inspect the selected organism.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Verify organism cards are displayed
Open an organism card from the list
Verify the organism detail page is displayed

title: Browse bio-storage and open an organism detail page
description: This verifies that a user can navigate from the organism list to a specific organism’s detail page for deeper inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card
Verify the organism detail page is displayed
Verify organism DNA information is displayed

title: Breed two organisms into a new offspring
description: A user can choose two organisms, start breeding, and see a new offspring organism created.

steps.description: Navigate to /breed
Select the first organism
Select the second organism
Start the breeding process
Verify a new offspring organism is created
Verify the offspring is available for further viewing

title: Keep the user in the create flow after completion when no redirect occurs
description: This verifies that the create experience remains usable after a completed birth flow and the user can continue from the creation page.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill in the idea seed field with a raw organism concept
Submit the creation form
Verify the create experience is available after the birth completes
Verify a completed creation state is displayed

title: View organism growth analytics
description: A user can open an organism’s telemetry tab and see analytics content for that organism.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Click the telemetry tab
Verify analytics charts are displayed
Verify organism statistics are displayed

title: Move from organism analysis to family tree or telemetry inspection
description: This verifies that a user can continue from an organism detail page into deeper analysis views such as the family tree or telemetry tab.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Open the Family Tree tab
Open the Telemetry tab
Verify family tree information is displayed
Verify telemetry information is displayed

title: Browse the landing page and reach the create flow
description: This verifies that a visitor can explore the landing page and use the primary creation call to action to reach organism birth.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the landing page feature sections
Scroll through the how-it-operates section
Click the primary creation call to action
Verify the create page is displayed
Verify the birth form is visible

title: Complete breeding and open the offspring in bio-storage
description: A user can breed organisms and then reach the newly created offspring from the resulting storage view.

steps.description: Navigate to /breed
Select the first organism
Select the second organism
Start the breeding process
Open the new offspring organism from the result view
Verify the offspring organism detail page is displayed
Verify the new organism is present in bio-storage

title: Inspect family tree and telemetry from an organism detail page
description: This verifies that a user can move from the detail page into family and telemetry views for follow-up analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Click an organism card
Switch to the Family Tree tab
Switch to the Telemetry tab
Verify family relationship information is displayed
Verify telemetry data is displayed

title: Browse the landing page and reach the mesh explorer
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the landing page mesh call to action to reach the 3D explorer.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll through the landing page feature sections
Click the mesh exploration call to action
Verify the mesh explorer page is displayed
Verify the public mesh view is visible

title: Create an offspring by breeding two organisms
description: This verifies that a user can choose two organisms to synthesize an offspring and then access the newly created organism in bio-storage.

steps.description: Navigate to /breed
Choose two organisms to breed
Submit the breeding action
Verify a new offspring organism is created
Verify the offspring is available in bio-storage or a detail view

title: Start breeding two organisms and confirm a new offspring exists
description: This verifies that a user can choose two organisms to synthesize offspring and then see the new organism available in bio-storage.

steps.description: Navigate to /breed
Choose the first organism
Choose the second organism
Submit the breeding form
Verify a new organism is created
Verify the offspring is available in bio-storage

title: Breed two organisms and view the new offspring
description: This verifies that a user can choose two organisms on the breeding page, synthesize offspring, and reach the new organism’s detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /breed
Choose the first organism
Choose the second organism
Submit the breeding action
Verify a new organism is created
Verify the new organism detail page is displayed

title: Explore the public mesh and open an organism from a node selection
description: This verifies that a user can enter the 3D mesh, select an organism node, and reach the organism detail view for deeper analysis.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesh
Select an organism node in the mesh
Verify the selected organism detail view is displayed
Verify organism information is displayed for the selected node

title: Select an organism node in the mesh and open its detail view
description: This verifies that a user can explore the mesh, select a node, and continue into the organism detail page.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesh
Select an organism node in the mesh
Open the selected organism from the mesh
Verify the organism detail page is displayed
Verify the selected organism content is displayed

title: Select an organism node from the mesh and inspect it
description: This verifies that a user can explore the public mesh, select a node, and open the selected organism in detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesh
Select an organism node in the mesh
Verify the selected organism is highlighted or focused
Open the selected organism
Verify the organism detail page is displayed

title: Select an organism from the mesh
description: A user can select an organism node in the mesh and open its detail view for deeper inspection.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesh
Select an organism node
Verify the selected organism detail view is displayed
Verify organism information is available for inspection

title: Copy a DNA strand and see confirmation feedback
description: This verifies that a user can copy a strand from the DNA core and receive visible feedback that the copy action succeeded.

steps.description: Navigate to /organisms
Open an organism card from the list
Open the DNA Core tab
Copy a DNA strand
Verify copied confirmation feedback is visible
Verify the DNA strand remains displayed

title: Explore the public organism mesh
description: A visitor can open the 3D mesh explorer and view the public organism field.

steps.description: Navigate to /mesh
Verify the 3D organism mesh is displayed
Verify public organisms are visible in the mesh

title: Reject an empty organism seed submission
description: This verifies that the create flow blocks submission when the user provides no idea seed and shows validation feedback.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Submit the organism creation form without entering a seed
Verify a seed validation error is visible
Verify no organism detail page is displayed

title: Handle a direct organism URL when state is not hydrated
description: This verifies that opening an organism detail page directly without prior hydration shows the organism void state instead of a populated record.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Verify the organism void state is displayed
Verify organism details are not displayed

title: Handle a very short or invalid seed before creation
description: This verifies that the create flow surfaces validation feedback when the user enters an invalid seed and does not create an organism.

steps.description: Navigate to /create
Fill in an invalid short seed into the seed field
Submit the organism creation form
Verify a seed validation error is visible
Verify no organism was created

title: Show a void state for an unknown organism page
description: A user who opens an organism page without hydrated client state sees the empty organism void state instead of a broken detail view.

steps.description: Navigate to /organism/nexus-1778519558047-g39zhxlml
Verify an organism void state is displayed
Verify organism detail content is not displayed
